integrations.name: Meta Ads
integrations.overview: Meta Ads: Facebook / Instagram Marketing API OAuth app id/secret are configured on the Solvomo API (`.env.vendors`). Collect before OAuth: ad_account_id. Default OAuth scopes: ads_management, ads_read. Flow: app POSTs any remaining fields to POST /auth/connections/oauth/start, then redirects to the provider authorization URL.

definitionGet.note: JWT required; optional verification against this manifest.

body.credentials: Record<string, string> — values for manifest credential keys; may be empty when the API fills OAuth app id/secret from `.env.vendors`.
body.brandprofile_id: Optional; ties the connection to the current brand profile.
body.success_redirect_url: Absolute URL — API redirects here after OAuth success.
body.failure_redirect_url: Absolute URL — API redirects here on OAuth error.
body.client_state: Optional opaque string echoed to success redirect.

integrations.name: OpenAI Ads
integrations.description: ChatGPT Ads API — campaigns, ad groups, ads, creatives, and insights via api.ads.openai.com.
integrations.overview: OpenAI Ads: ChatGPT Ads API — campaigns, ad groups, ads, creatives, and insights via api.ads.openai.com. Provide api_key from your OpenAI Ads Manager account. Create an API key in the Settings tab of your OpenAI Ads Manager account. Use the Ads API host https://api.ads.openai.com — separate from api.openai.com platform keys. Flow: app POSTs the API key to POST /auth/connections/api-key/connect.

tokenInstructions: Create an API key in the Settings tab of your OpenAI Ads Manager account.
Use the Ads API host https://api.ads.openai.com — separate from api.openai.com platform keys.

definitionGet.note: JWT required; optional verification against this manifest.

body.brandprofile_id: Required; ties the connection to the current brand profile.
